title: Editorial Contact Sheet Grid AI
sourceTitle: Editorial Contact Sheet Grid AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Nine-frame editorial portrait grid built around adult editorial model with expressive eyes, natural skin texture, and quiet character-driven presence, lightweight dark navy shirt, cream-colored trousers, barefoot styling, and unfiltered natural fabric folds, dark navy fabric used to softly obscure the hand, cheekbone, shoulder, and partial face, and serene focused gaze, hands layered near the face, and intimate introspective editorial minimalism. Subject: adult editorial model with expressive eyes, natural skin texture, and quiet character-driven presence appears consistently across all nine frames with the same face, hair logic, skin texture, proportions, and restrained editorial presence. Visible styling: lightweight dark navy shirt, cream-colored trousers, barefoot styling, and unfiltered natural fabric folds. Scene: Warm soft beige studio backdrop with tactile fabric depth, quiet negative space, and an unfiltered raw editorial atmosphere. Composition: Fixed 3x3 photo grid with nine distinct crops: ultra-close lips and cheekbone with hand partly obscuring, tight eyes looking into lens, monochrome chin-on-fist close portrait, over-shoulder partial face framed by fabric, frontal hands-over-face with a light streak across the eyes, angled hair-forward portrait, jawline-and-hands texture crop, half-body seated sideways on a low cube, and intense profile with one water droplet. Signature Elements: dark navy fabric used to softly obscure the hand, cheekbone, shoulder, and partial face frames and partly obscures the subject in selected frames; serene focused gaze, hands layered near the face, and intimate introspective editorial minimalism keeps the grid intimate, introspective, and character-focused. Style: RAW editorial fashion photography with professional muted color grade, fluid tonal contrast, delicate cinematic grain, natural skin texture, and character-driven minimalism. Color Palette: Fixed warm beige studio neutrals, dark navy or black wardrobe contrast, cream trousers, soft skin tones, restrained monochrome frame, and subtle silver reflector highlights. Lighting: Wide diffused main light from front-right, silver fill reflector on the left, faint rim light from above, and precise light slices reflected in eyes and across the face. Camera: Mixed 85mm, 50mm, and 35mm editorial lens language with razor-shallow focus for close crops, subtle high and low angle variation, and clean grid alignment. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Subject: adult androgynous editorial model with sharp eyes, natural skin texture, and introspective calm appears consistently across all nine frames with the same face, hair logic, skin texture, proportions, and restrained editorial presence. Visible styling: lightweight black linen shirt, cream pleated trousers, barefoot styling, and minimal silver ring. Scene: Warm soft beige studio backdrop with tactile fabric depth, quiet negative space, and an unfiltered raw editorial atmosphere. Composition: Fixed 3x3 photo grid with nine distinct crops: ultra-close lips and cheekbone with hand partly obscuring, tight eyes looking into lens, monochrome chin-on-fist close portrait, over-shoulder partial face framed by fabric, frontal hands-over-face with a light streak across the eyes, angled hair-forward portrait, jawline-and-hands texture crop, half-body seated sideways on a low cube, and intense profile with one water droplet. Signature Elements: soft charcoal fabric curtain used as a blurred foreground frame in several close crops frames and partly obscures the subject in selected frames; intense introspective gaze, restrained mouth, relaxed shoulders, and quiet editorial tension keeps the grid intimate, introspective, and character-focused. Style: RAW editorial fashion photography with professional muted color grade, fluid tonal contrast, delicate cinematic grain, natural skin texture, and character-driven minimalism. Color Palette: Fixed warm beige studio neutrals, dark navy or black wardrobe contrast, cream trousers, soft skin tones, restrained monochrome frame, and subtle silver reflector highlights. Lighting: Wide diffused main light from front-right, silver fill reflector on the left, faint rim light from above, and precise light slices reflected in eyes and across the face. Camera: Mixed 85mm, 50mm, and 35mm editorial lens language with razor-shallow focus for close crops, subtle high and low angle variation, and clean grid alignment. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.
